subject: Camerupt, a large quadruped camel-like Fire-type Pokemon with volcanic humps on its back, standing on a rocky barren landscape
description: A heavyset, four-legged creature with a camel-like silhouette stands on a rocky, arid terrain. Two prominent volcanic dome-shaped humps rise from its back, clearly the defining feature of its design. The body is rendered in reddish-brown tones with orange highlights. The background shows a barren rocky landscape under warm atmospheric haze — dusty, sun-baked, inhospitable. The creature's posture is stable and grounded, facing toward the viewer at a slight angle. The volcanic humps suggest dormant but immense destructive potential.
foreground: Large reddish-brown quadruped camel-like creature with two volcanic dome humps on its back
background: Rocky barren terrain under warm dusty haze
